name: screen-guardian
description: Ultra-light compatibility-first AI screen access with fallback adapters.

interface.shortDescription: 不强迫升级的超轻量 AI 屏幕访问。
interface.longDescription: Screen Guardian is freedom-preserving capability infrastructure for personal AI. This release maps audio into the same optional capability model: microphone clips, system-loopback diagnostics, audio analysis, and video audio extraction stay inactive unless enabled, while transcription or narration routes can be prepared for APIs or subagents.
defaultPrompt: Watch a window briefly for visual changes.
Turn an optional capability on or off.
Check whether audio capture is available.
